scripts.dev:backend:vuln: cmd /V /C "set APP_MODE=vulnerable&& cd sofia-backend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend:secure: cmd /V /C "set APP_MODE=secure&& cd sofia-backend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:vuln: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend:vuln"
scripts.dev:secure: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend:secure"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.attack:all:vuln: npm run attack:sqli:vuln && npm run attack:xss:vuln && npm run attack:traversal:vuln && npm run attack:payment:vuln
scripts.attack:all:secure: npm run attack:sqli:secure && npm run attack:xss:secure && npm run attack:traversal:secure && npm run attack:payment:secure
